meaning: n.巴比伦神话中的风雨神
examples: In order to remember Zu, some mathematicians suggest calling pi "Zu Lv".
Zu was best known for his calculation of pi (π).
Karl-Theodor zu Guttenberg, an aristocrat who lives in a Bavarian castle, admitted breaching standards but denied deliberately cheating.
Foreign-policy making is increasingly influenced by younger pragmatists, says Karl-Theodor Freiherr zu Guttenberg, of the Christian Social Union.
